title: ReformUndyingTotem
description: Reform and enhanced the undying totem
body:
# 中文介绍
这款模组重做并加强了不死图腾，我为不死图腾新增了图腾条，玩家可以消耗图腾条来触发三个对应的图腾技能，我是一名[哔哩哔哩](https://space.bilibili.com/3546795212802660?spm_id_from=333.788.0.0)模组区up主，实际上不死图腾重做的部分功能是我采纳了观众的有趣建议和想法。

![新增-不死图腾条](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a155c7d8fbdf162f88be40d0e5ac30acf7105fb.png)

# English Introduction
My mod has been reform and enhanced with the Undead Totem. I have added a totem bar to the Undead Totem, which players can use to trigger three corresponding totem skills. I am a [Bilibili] (https://space.bilibili.com/3546795212802660?spm_id_from=333.788.0.0) Mod domain video creator, In fact, part of the functionality of redoing the Undead Totem was that I adopted interesting suggestions and ideas from the audience.
